titles.title: Blessed Be The Name Of The Lord

verse.name: C1
verse.lines: Blessed be the name of the Lord, Blessed be the name of the Lord, Blessed be the name of the Lord, the most high

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: The name of the Lord is a strong tower, the righteous run into it, and they are saved.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Jesus is the name of the Lord, Jesus is the name of the Lord, Jesus is the name of the Lord, the most high
